name: Tempus AI, Inc.
business: Tempus AI, Inc. offers two product lines: Diagnostics, which includes next-generation sequencing and other molecular testing, and Data and applications, which provides de-identified data and analytics to pharmaceutical and biotechnology partners. The company serves healthcare providers, pharmaceutical companies, biotechnology companies, and researchers.

exposures.sentence: Tempus is a technology company focused on healthcare that strives to combine deep healthcare expertise, providing next-generation diagnostics across multiple disease areas, with leading technology capabilities, harnessing the power of data and analytics to help personalize medicine.
We currently offer two product lines: Diagnostics and Data and applications.

Data and applications primarily includes revenue from de-identified data generated through our Diagnostics product line to our pharmaceutical and biotechnology partners for use in their drug development efforts.
